changes.description: Hardened export pipeline and safety checks for more thorough file validation
Fix terminal classes not appearing in installed workspaces — seed from package template on sync/update
Fix action updates not syncing to existing workspaces on slycode sync/update
Fix package path mismatch in terminal-classes API fallback
Seed terminal-classes.json on sync and update for existing workspaces
Scaffold includes terminal-classes.json in new projects
Terminal classes API hardening and error handling
Minor action priority and metadata fixes across store actions
Cross-agent challenge actions: send designs or implementations to another AI provider for adversarial review
Show current git branch in the web dashboard and messaging responses
Changelog modal in the dashboard — view version history and what shipped in each release
Preserve card fields when merging cards via drag-and-drop
Fix automation run notifications not being delivered via messaging
Clarify voice shortcut formatting in the tutorial template
Cross-card prompt execution: send prompts from one card session to another via the kanban CLI
Fix double-submit when messaging delivered the same prompt twice in quick succession
Per-card provider model selection across web UI, bridge, and messaging — pick which model variant a session uses
Documentation refresh and feature guide updates
Shift+Enter inserts newlines in terminal input instead of submitting
Fix session detection when working directory is a symlink
Cleaner PTY environment variables when spawning provider CLIs
MCP store pipeline updates: managed MCP servers in the canonical store
MCP feature spec groundwork and minor UI tweaks
Terminal submit fix: Enter key now reliably submits prompts to the active provider
Replaced node-telegram-bot-api with raw Telegram API — smaller dependency footprint, fewer security audit issues
Fix paste timing issues in the terminal so multi-line pastes land cleanly
macOS launchd fix: services now spawn with the correct PATH
PTY PATH fix: provider CLIs find the right binaries in inherited environments
Spawn error toast: surface CLI spawn failures directly in the UI
sly-kanban archive --undo: restore archived cards from the CLI
Fix createdAt timestamp on newly created cards
AWS Transcribe S3-based STT pipeline as an additional voice transcription backend
Fix stale entries in the project registry after deletion
systemd-aware service lifecycle management on Linux
slycode env wrapper for consistent service environment variables
slycode restart command for clean service restarts
Store UI now shows all skills regardless of manifest filtering — better visibility for store contents
AWS Transcribe Streaming as a voice transcription backend option
Automation diagnostic logging for easier troubleshooting of scheduled runs
Quick-access cards in messaging: see active and recent cards immediately after switching projects
Store manifest filtering in build pipeline — only manifest-approved skills ship in the package
Instruction file check now validates correctly during session creation
